source_name: Code4rena Nudge.xyz Findings and Analysis Report (2025-03) - Low Risk and Non-Critical Issues
issue_claim: Missing validation for holdingPeriodInSeconds in NudgePointsCampaigns
why_it_looked_bad: NudgePointsCampaigns.createPointsCampaign and createPointsCampaigns validate targetToken but do not require holdingPeriodInSeconds to be greater than zero. A privileged campaign creator can create a points campaign with no effective holding period, undermining the intended token-retention incentive model.
why_not_valid: zero holding period is privileged campaign misconfiguration unless untrusted campaign creation or reward farming is proven
downgrade_reason: zero holding period is privileged campaign misconfiguration unless untrusted campaign creation or reward farming is proven
trust_assumption: Treat as a caution/false-positive reference unless the current target shows permissionless reachability, direct value loss, and concrete affected code path.
when_it_could_be_real: if an untrusted party can create campaigns
if external systems treat any created campaign as economically valid without admin review
if zero holding period enables reward farming that drains funded incentives
